calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust'S Title To Real Property
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Negrette, via ZOOM, counsel for Virginia Garber, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that it believes that venue is proper. The court then asks if there are any objections to the court granting this petition, no objections are presented.

After additional discussion, the court takes the Petition for Order Confirming Trust's Title to Real Property under submission, with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported. (D204)
